attributes.description: Overview of OpenAI Compliance Logs Platform activity across app, auth, audit, and Codex event types.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI

**Compliance**

This dashboard gives visibility into the compliance data stream of OpenAI, showing activity collected from the ChatGPT Enterprise Compliance Logs Platform. It highlights total events and unique actors, trends of compliance events by type over time, and event category breakdowns. It surfaces top actions, top users by activity, and top source IPs, along with Codex model usage and security findings. Use the controls above to filter by event type, action, outcome, and user. Together, these panels offer a compliance-level view to support security oversight, auditing, and usage analysis.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs OpenAI] Compliance Overview
